hero.title: Restore Your Movement & Reclaim Your Life
hero.description: Expert physiotherapy care led by Dr. Disha Viraj Ranade. We specialize in spine rehabilitation, sports injuries, post-operative care, and prenatal/postnatal wellness in a state-of-the-art clinic.

services.title: MSK (Musculoskeletal) Care
services.desc: Effective diagnosis and rehabilitation for joint pain, muscle strains, arthritis, osteoarthritis, and general stiffness.
services.details: Musculoskeletal physiotherapy focuses on treating injuries and conditions that affect your muscles, joints, ligaments, tendons, and bones. Whether you suffer from chronic lower back pain, knee osteoarthritis, shoulder impingement, or joint stiffness, our treatment targets the root cause. We combine hands-on manual therapy, joint mobilizations, and structured therapeutic exercises to restore pain-free movement, increase strength, and prevent future recurrences.

services.title: Spine Related Rehabilitation
services.desc: Specialized spine care utilizing our advanced Spinal Decompression Bed for slip disc, sciatica, cervical/lumbar spondylosis.
services.details: Our spine rehabilitation program is designed to treat herniated discs, slipped discs, sciatica, cervical radiculopathy, and chronic neck/back pain without surgery. We utilize our state-of-the-art computer-controlled 4D Spinal Decompression Bed and traction units. This therapy gently decompresses the spine, creating a negative vacuum pressure inside the discs to relieve pinched nerves, reduce inflammation, and accelerate natural recovery.

services.title: Post-Operative Physiotherapy
services.desc: Tailored recovery plans following orthopedic surgeries such as joint replacements (TKR/THR), ACL reconstruction, and fracture fixation.
services.details: Post-operative rehabilitation is crucial for achieving full recovery and joint functionality after orthopedic surgery. We design structured progressive rehabilitation plans for Total Knee Replacements (TKR), Total Hip Replacements (THR), ACL/meniscus reconstructions, and post-fracture fixation. Our therapy focuses on early mobilization, safe swelling management, muscle activation, gait training, and progressive strength loading.

services.title: Pre-Natal & Post-Natal Fitness
services.desc: Safe exercises and postural training to manage pregnancy pain, strengthen pelvic floor muscles, and facilitate smooth postpartum recovery.
services.details: Our pre-natal and post-natal program is led by certified experts to ensure a safe, active, and comfortable pregnancy and postpartum journey. We offer customized exercises for pelvic girdle pain, lower back strains, diastasis recti recovery, pelvic floor strengthening, and postural alignment. Our goal is to prepare your body for labor and ensure a healthy, structured return to fitness after birth.

services.title: Geriatric Physiotherapy
services.desc: Gentle exercises focused on improving balance, preventing falls, boosting mobility, and managing osteoporosis/arthritis in elderly patients.
services.details: Geriatric physiotherapy focuses on preserving independence, improving quality of life, and boosting physical confidence in elderly individuals. Our gentle exercises target age-related concerns like balance deficits, osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, osteoporosis, and general mobility limitations. We customize safe, slow-paced training programs to prevent falls, rebuild joint stability, and manage pain.

services.title: Sports Injury & Fitness
services.desc: Targeted recovery for athletes with sprains, ligament tears, tendonitis, and functional conditioning to ensure a safe return to sport.
services.details: Our sports rehabilitation is tailored for athletes of all levels to recover from sports-specific injuries like ankle sprains, muscle tears, ACL strains, tennis elbow, and rotator cuff injuries. We utilize advanced electrotherapy suites, manual therapy (Dry Needling, Cupping, IASTM), and functional rehabilitation grids to restore joint agility, muscle power, and coordinate safe sport-specific return protocols.

facilities.name: 4D Fully Automatic Spinal Decompression Bed
facilities.desc: Our flagship advanced decompression bed. It utilizes intelligent traction systems to gently relieve spinal pressure, targeting herniated discs, sciatica, and chronic back pain without surgical intervention.

facilities.name: Rising Yeti Weight Training
facilities.desc: A cutting-edge weight training system specifically customized for physiotherapy rehabilitation. It allows incremental, safe, and guided loading to restore strength and joint stability.

facilities.name: Traction Bed & Unit
facilities.desc: Equipped with automated cervical and lumbar traction units to target nerve compressions and spinal stiffness.

facilities.name: Advanced Electrotherapy Suite
facilities.desc: Comprehensive pain relief and healing units including Interferential Therapy (IFT), TENS, Therapeutic Ultrasound, Shockwave Therapy, and Laser Therapy.

facilities.name: Manual & Sports Therapy
facilities.desc: Specialized clinical interventions including Dry Needling, Cupping Therapy, IASTM (Instrument Assisted Soft Tissue Mobilization), and Kinesiology Taping.

doctors.name: Dr. Disha Viraj Ranade
doctors.title: Founder & Chief Physiotherapist
doctors.bio: Dr. Disha Viraj Ranade (PT), BPTh, is the Chief Physiotherapist & Founder of Sukham Physiotherapy and Rehab. She is a registered member of the Indian Association of Physiotherapists (IAP Reg No. 71561) with senior clinical experience at Kelkar Orthopaedic Hospital, Nashik. She specializes in spine decompression, post-operative care, musculoskeletal (MSK) rehab, and home visits. She is a highly certified specialist in Pre/Post-Natal Fitness, Cupping (CMDCT), Dry Needling (CDNT), Kinesio Taping (CKTT), and IASTM.

credentials.name: Certified Clinical Specialist
credentials.source: Dry Needling (CDNT), Cupping (CMDCT), IASTM & Kinesio Taping

doctors.name: Amit Sharma
doctors.title: Outreach Coordinator
doctors.bio: Amit coordinates our community health camps, corporate ergonomic wellness workshops, and public outreach programs across Nashik, helping extend Sukham's healing services to corporate and rural segments.

testimonies.name: Mr. Rajesh Shinde
testimonies.text: I was suffering from debilitating sciatica and could barely walk. Dr. Disha suggested decompression therapy on the 4D Automatic Bed. After a few sessions, the pain reduced by 80%. Truly magical treatment and wonderful clinic!

testimonies.name: Mrs. Priya Kulkarni
testimonies.text: Highly recommend Dr. Disha for prenatal and post-natal core strengthening. She guided me through safe, targeted exercises that relieved my chronic pregnancy-induced lower back pain completely.

testimonies.name: Mr. Amit Verma
testimonies.text: Recovering from ACL surgery is tough, but the rehabilitation program at Sukham using the Rising Yeti training unit helped me regain full range of motion and strength. Very professional environment.

blogs.title: Understanding Spinal Decompression: A Non-Surgical Cure for Back Pain
blogs.author: Dr. Disha Viraj Ranade
blogs.excerpt: Learn how the latest 4D Automatic Spinal Decompression Bed works to relieve pressure from compressed spinal nerves and treat sciatica.
blogs.content:
Chronic lower back pain and sciatica are often caused by bulging or herniated discs that pinch sensitive spinal nerves. Traditionally, surgery was the primary option when conservative treatments failed. Today, advanced technologies like the 4D Fully Automatic Spinal Decompression Bed offer a safe, pain-free alternative.

Spinal decompression works by gently stretching the spine. This creates a negative pressure (a vacuum effect) within the spinal discs, which helps pull the bulging or herniated disc material back into place. Additionally, this stretching increases blood flow, oxygen, and nutrient-rich fluids into the disc, accelerating natural healing.

Unlike old traction tables, our 4D Decompression Bed uses sensitive computer-guided sensors that detect muscle resistance. If your body tries to spasm, the table automatically adjusts, ensuring a comfortable and targeted treatment. Sessions typically take 20 to 30 minutes and require no recovery downtime. If you suffer from slip disc, chronic neck/back pain, or leg numbness, this treatment could help you avoid surgery.

blogs.title: Rehabilitation After Joint Replacement: Why Early Physiotherapy is Key
blogs.author: Dr. Disha Viraj Ranade
blogs.excerpt: Undergoing Total Knee or Hip Replacement? Discover why starting structured physiotherapy within 24 hours of surgery guarantees recovery.
blogs.content:
Getting a Total Knee Replacement (TKR) or Total Hip Replacement (THR) is a major step toward restoring pain-free mobility. However, the surgery itself is only half the battle. The ultimate success of joint replacement depends heavily on post-operative physiotherapy.

Many patients believe they should rest for weeks after surgery. In reality, modern medical guidelines advise starting gentle movement within the first 24 hours! Early mobilization prevents stiffness, reduces swelling, increases blood circulation (preventing dangerous blood clots), and helps retrain muscles surrounding the new joint.

At Sukham, we design customized progressive exercises. In the early stages, we focus on pain relief, gentle range of motion, and weight-bearing tasks. Later, we introduce advanced conditioning using weight training units like the Rising Yeti. This structured approach helps patients walk independently and resume daily life weeks ahead of schedule.

faqs.question: Who is the chief physiotherapist at Sukham Physiotherapy and Rehab?
faqs.answer: The clinic is founded and led by Dr. Disha Viraj Ranade, a highly certified BPTh physiotherapist and registered member of the Indian Association of Physiotherapists (IAP Reg No. 71561), with extensive clinical experience at Kelkar Orthopaedic Hospital.

faqs.question: What specialized treatments do you offer at your Gangapur Road clinic?
faqs.answer: We offer advanced 4D Fully Automatic Spinal Decompression Therapy, Rising Yeti weight training rehabilitation, electrotherapy suites (IFT, TENS, Ultrasound), and specialized manual therapies such as Dry Needling, Cupping, and IASTM.

faqs.question: Do I need a doctor's prescription or referral to start physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: No, you do not need a direct referral to start treatment. You can book an appointment directly with us. Dr. Disha Ranade (PT) will conduct a thorough musculoskeletal evaluation and design a customized recovery program for you.

faqs.question: How does the 4D Spinal Decompression therapy help with back pain or sciatica?
faqs.answer: Our fully automatic decompression bed uses gentle, computer-controlled traction to decompress the spinal discs. This creates negative pressure that relieves compressed nerves, reduces sciatica, and helps pull bulging discs back into position without surgery.

faqs.question: What are the clinic timings, and how can I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday from 10:30 AM - 7:00 PM (Closed on Sundays). You can book a slot directly via our website WhatsApp contact form or by calling us at 7447862720.
